backend/main.mo: Main actor defining the snack ordering system with catalog, cart, order management, and bank account storage, including migration support and functions for CRUD operations on snack items, cart management, checkout with phone numbers, and bank account information.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old Order records (without customerPhone) to new Order records (with customerPhone defaulting to "Unknown") and adds empty bankAccounts map during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: bank information admin page, navigation link to bank page, phone number input in checkout, phone display in order confirmation, and phone display in admin order management.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the React application structure with TanStack Router, React Query hooks, pages for catalog/cart/checkout/admin/bank management, and UI components with warm food truck theme styling.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining design tokens for light and dark modes using OKLCH color system, including custom properties for background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title "Chosen One Tri-State Snack on the Go" and root div mounting the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for catalog, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin, snacks, orders, about, and bank information pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider with Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item display component showing product thumbnail, name, unit price, quantity, and calculated subtotal in a card layout with price formatting in dollars.
frontend/src/components/ImageUpload.tsx: Reusable image upload component handling file selection, preview display, validation, and conversion to ExternalBlob with upload progress tracking for backend storage.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header containing logo, navigation buttons (About, Snacks, Orders, Bank, Admin), and a shopping cart icon with item count badge. Includes a footer with copyright information.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a snack item card with image, name, description, price, quantity selector, and add-to-cart button. Includes a delete button with confirmation dialog for removing items from the catalog.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Automatically invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Manages a persistent user ID stored in localStorage for cart functionality, generating a unique ID if none exists.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and authentication status tracking. Creates and manages AuthClient with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including fetching snack items, managing cart (get, add, clear, update), checkout, orders, and bank account information. Each mutation automatically invalidates relevant queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using warm food truck theme (orange, yellow, red accents) for both light and dark modes. Imports Poppins and Pacifico fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying company mission, founding year (2026), and three value propositions (Premium Selection, Mobile Convenience, Community First) using cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page for adding new snack items with a form that includes ID, name, description, price, and image upload fields, plus a list view of existing items.
frontend/src/pages/BankInformation.tsx: Bank information management page allowing users to view and update bank account details (account holder name, bank name, account number, routing number) for receiving payments.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls, total price calculation, clear cart functionality, and checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page with a contact information form (name, email, address, phone) and order summary, handling order submission and redirecting to order confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays order confirmation details after checkout, showing customer information (name, email, phone, address), ordered items with quantities and prices, and total amount with a success message.
frontend/src/pages/OrderManagement.tsx: Admin page that displays all customer orders in a list view with order details including customer information, items ordered, quantities, prices, and total amounts.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Main customer-facing page displaying hero banner, food truck image, and grid of available snack items using ProductCard components with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/SnackManagement.tsx: Admin page for viewing and deleting snack items from the catalog, displaying items in a grid with images, details, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extending colors (using OKLCH color space), typography (Poppins and Pacifico fonts), animations, and plugins for the food truck app design system.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features, architectural notes, and known issues for a mobile snack shop app called 'Chosen One Tri-State Snack on the Go' with product catalog, cart, checkout, and admin functionality.
